channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: PS Plus Library Titles Leaving in July 2026
item.description: Sony's PlayStation Plus is removing several titles, including Risk of Rain 2 and Tropico 6. Players have limited time to enjoy these games before they disappear.

item.title: Apple's Siri Upgrade: Consistency Across Devices
item.description: Apple announces a significant Siri upgrade, ensuring the same experience across all devices. This change aims to enhance user interaction with the assistant.

item.title: Atonemo's NTS Radio Player Enhances Hi-Fi Experience
item.description: Atonemo and NTS Radio launch a player that integrates internet radio with streaming services for high-fidelity audio. This innovation targets audiophiles seeking quality sound.

item.title: Take-Two's Ex-AI Chief Critiques Generative AI Hype
item.description: The former AI head at Take-Two warns that generative AI hype could negatively impact traditional AI's future use. He advocates for a balanced view of AI technologies.

item.title: watchOS 27 Drops Support for Older Apple Watches
item.description: Apple's watchOS 27 will no longer support five older Apple Watch models, focusing on newer devices. This decision reflects the company's shift towards updated technology.

item.title: Crimson Desert's Latest Update Patch Notes Released
item.description: Crimson Desert has launched a new update, introducing various enhancements and features to engage players. The update aims to revitalize interest in the game.

item.title: Epic Games Launcher to Undergo Major Overhaul
item.description: Epic Games confirms a complete rebuild of its launcher, promising significant speed improvements. Users can expect a more efficient experience in the future.

item.title: Game Pass Needs Big Hits, Says Moon Studios Boss
item.description: Moon Studios' Thomas Mahler claims Xbox Game Pass could have succeeded with more standout titles. He highlights the need for quality content to drive subscriptions.

item.title: Top 20 Video Games of 2026 So Far Revealed
item.description: Despite industry challenges, 2026 has produced strong game contenders for the year. The list includes both established franchises and new IPs.

item.title: EA Sports UFC 6: Must-Try Fighters for Realism
item.description: EA Sports UFC 6 highlights key fighters to enhance gameplay experience. Players are encouraged to explore standout characters for a more authentic feel.

item.title: Pragmata Update Now Available with New Features
item.description: Capcom releases a new update for Pragmata, introducing exciting features and improvements. Players can now enjoy enhanced gameplay with the latest patch.

item.title: Glaive Rush Mega Baxcalibur Community Day Announced
item.description: Pokémon GO's Community Day aims to elevate several Pokémon's relevance in competitive play. This event is expected to boost their performance in PvP and PvE.

item.title: PlayStation Adjusts PC Strategy Amid Revenue Concerns
item.description: PlayStation alters its first-party PC strategy due to disappointing revenue. Live-service titles will continue to be prioritized on the platform.

item.title: Doom Composer Bobby Prince Passes Away at 81
item.description: Bobby Prince, renowned for his iconic Doom soundtrack, has died at 81. His contributions to gaming music were recognized with preservation in the Library of Congress.

item.title: Google Fixes Pixel Widgets Issue in Android 17
item.description: Android 17 users report disappearing home screen widgets, but Google is working on a fix. The issue appears limited to devices with work profiles.
